title: This Is Bad... They Just Shut Down FABLE 5
summary: A YouTube video discussing Anthropic's Fable 5 and Mythos 5 models being shut down by US government order after three days of public availability. The video questions implications for future frontier AI access and whether powerful models will remain available to the public or be restricted to government control.
writeup: The video reports that Anthropic's Fable 5 and Mythos 5 models were shut down by US government order three days after becoming publicly available. It frames this as a case study in how frontier AI access could be curtailed by regulators. The central question raised is whether powerful models will stay open to the public or shift toward government control, with implications for future model restrictions and AI safety policy.
